policy.providerPolicy: Provider output can support verification; it cannot define coverage. Coverage is defined by the coverage/watch map, not by day-active fixture availability.
policy.dayActivityPolicy: Coverage rows are watch/discovery candidates until independent official or trusted evidence proves active_for_day, no_expected_fixtures, out_of_season, season_break, or upcoming_season.
policy.espnPolicy: ESPN is supplemental verification/crosscheck evidence only, not an acquisition dependency and not value-ready authority.
policy.noAdapterPolicy: No structured adapter must become autonomous acquisition required, not skip.
policy.valuePolicy: Supplemental-only evidence is not value-ready without independent verified non-ESPN or official-source confirmation.
